race.comment: UNCLE BARRY (4) returns and makes his stable debut for the Doudle camp. Brings solid NSW figures over the border and his recent jumpout should have him forward enough. Draws the A1 and looks the one to beat. REIBY PRINCESS (11) finds the maiden win elusive but has come along nicely this campaign and is desperate to break through. Drops back in trip off a 45-day and keeps Milnes. Gets another great chance to get off the mark. UNCLOTHED (12) is another that returns and debuts for her new stable. Has jumped out strongly in readiness and gets in light with the 2kg claim. Expected to be very competitive. DRAGON FISH (7) is mixing her form but boasts peaks that can measure up. Drops back in trip off 33 days and is worth keeping safe for a minor spot.
